tools.name: get_current_weather
tools.description: Get current weather conditions for a specified location

location.description: The location to get weather for (city name or coordinates)

tools.name: get_forecast
tools.description: Get weather forecast for a location for the specified number of days

location.description: The location to get forecast for

days.description: Number of days to forecast (default is 7)

tools.name: get_weather_alerts
tools.description: Get any weather alerts for a specified location

location.description: The location to check for weather alerts

tools.name: convert_temperature
tools.description: Convert temperature between Celsius and Fahrenheit

from_unit.description: The unit to convert from ('celsius' or 'fahrenheit')

to_unit.description: The unit to convert to ('celsius' or 'fahrenheit')
